suites.title: Create New grid - Finish/Reopen assignments
suites.description: Verify finishing and reopening assignments from Create New grid and map behavior

cases.title: Context menu shows Finish for Open assignment
cases.description: Verify Finish action is available only for assignment in Open status
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Create an assignment with size > 1.
3. Start one interview from the assignment so assignment remains in Open status.
4. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.

steps.action: Open context menu for assignment in Open status.
steps.expected_result: Finish item is visible in the context menu.

steps.action: Repeat step 1 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Finish item is visible in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Finish is not shown for non-Open assignment
cases.description: Verify Finish is not available when assignment status is not Open
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Finished status.

steps.action: Open context menu for assignment in Finished status.
steps.expected_result: Finish item is not displayed.

steps.action: Repeat step 1 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Finish item is not displayed in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Finish opens Confirmation Needed modal
cases.description: Verify modal appears after selecting Finish for Open assignment
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Open status.

steps.action: Open context menu for Open assignment and click Finish.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation Needed modal is displayed with Finish action button.

steps.action: Repeat step 1 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation Needed modal is displayed in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Finish sets assignment status to Finished before quantity reached
cases.description: Verify interviewer can finish assignment while assignment size is not fully consumed
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Create assignment with size N where N > 1.
3. Complete only one interview from this assignment.
4. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid and confirm assignment status is Open.

steps.action: Open context menu and click Finish for the Open assignment.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation Needed modal is displayed.

steps.action: Click Finish in the Confirmation Needed modal.
steps.expected_result: Assignment status in Create New grid changes to Finished.

steps.action: Repeat steps 1-2 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Assignment status changes to Finished in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Cancel Finish keeps assignment Open
cases.description: Verify cancel path from finish confirmation does not change assignment status
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Open status.

steps.action: Open context menu, click Finish and then close/cancel the confirmation modal.
steps.expected_result: Modal is closed and assignment status remains Open.

steps.action: Repeat step 1 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Assignment remains Open in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Context menu shows Reopen for Finished assignment
cases.description: Verify Reopen action is available for assignment in Finished status
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Finished status.

steps.action: Open context menu for assignment in Finished status.
steps.expected_result: Reopen item is visible in context menu.

steps.action: Repeat step 1 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Reopen item is visible in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Reopen opens Confirmation Needed modal
cases.description: Verify modal appears after selecting Reopen for Finished assignment
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Finished status.

steps.action: Open context menu for Finished assignment and click Reopen.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation Needed modal is displayed with Reopen action button.

steps.action: Repeat step 1 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation Needed modal is displayed in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Reopen sets assignment status back to Open
cases.description: Verify assignment status changes from Finished to Open after confirmation
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Finished status.

steps.action: Open context menu and click Reopen for Finished assignment.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation Needed modal is displayed.

steps.action: Click Reopen in the Confirmation Needed modal.
steps.expected_result: Assignment status in Create New grid changes to Open.

steps.action: Repeat steps 1-2 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Assignment status changes to Open in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Cancel Reopen keeps assignment Finished
cases.description: Verify cancel path from reopen confirmation keeps assignment unchanged
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Finished status.

steps.action: Open context menu, click Reopen and then close/cancel confirmation modal.
steps.expected_result: Modal is closed and assignment status remains Finished.

steps.action: Repeat step 1 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Assignment remains Finished in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Approved assignments are hidden from Create New grid
cases.description: Verify Approved assignments are not displayed in Create New grid
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Ensure there is at least one assignment that has Approved status.
3. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.

steps.action: Search/filter by known Approved assignment details in Create New grid.
steps.expected_result: Approved assignment is not present in grid results.

steps.action: Refresh page and repeat search/filter.
steps.expected_result: Approved assignment remains hidden.

steps.action: Repeat steps 1-2 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Approved assignments remain hidden in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Start new interview is disabled for Finished assignment
cases.description: Verify Start new interview action is disabled in context menu for Finished assignment
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Finished status.

steps.action: Open context menu for Finished assignment.
steps.expected_result: Start new interview option is visible but disabled and cannot be clicked.

steps.action: Attempt to trigger Start new interview with mouse click and keyboard Enter.
steps.expected_result: No new interview is created and user remains on the same page.

steps.action: Repeat steps 1-2 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Start new interview remains disabled in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Calendar actions are disabled for Finished assignment
cases.description: Verify Create/Edit calendar event actions are disabled for Finished assignment
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Navigate to Dashboard > Create New grid.
3. Ensure one assignment is in Finished status.

steps.action: Open context menu for Finished assignment.
steps.expected_result: Create calendar event and Edit calendar event options are disabled.

steps.action: Try to click disabled calendar options.
steps.expected_result: No calendar event create/edit form is opened.

steps.action: Repeat steps 1-2 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Both calendar options remain disabled in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Finished assignment marker is hidden on Map Dashboard
cases.description: Verify map does not show marker for assignment in Finished status
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Ensure assignment with geo location is set to Finished status.
3. Open Map Dashboard.

steps.action: Locate map area where Finished assignment marker used to be.
steps.expected_result: Marker for Finished assignment is not displayed on the map.

steps.action: Repeat step 1 after map zoom-in/zoom-out.
steps.expected_result: Finished assignment marker remains hidden at any zoom level.

steps.action: Repeat steps 1-2 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Finished assignment marker is hidden in all supported browsers.

cases.title: Open assignment marker is visible on Map Dashboard
cases.description: Verify map continues to show marker for assignment in Open status
cases.preconditions:
1. Login to Web Interview as Interviewer.
2. Ensure assignment with geo location is in Open status.
3. Open Map Dashboard.

steps.action: Locate assignment by known coordinates/label on map.
steps.expected_result: Open assignment marker is displayed in regular way.

steps.action: Reload map and re-check marker visibility.
steps.expected_result: Open marker stays visible after reload.

steps.action: Repeat steps 1-2 in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.
steps.expected_result: Open assignment marker is visible in all supported browsers.
